mecanica.title: AutoExpert Garage
mecanica.description: Platform for a premium repair shop focused on local authority, trust, and qualified contact generation.
mecanica.challenge: Stand out beyond price competition and generate more clear quote requests.
mecanica.focus: Direct commercial structure, organized services, and low-friction contact journey.

restaurante.title: Bistro Gourmet
restaurante.description: Digital experience for a restaurant with premium aesthetics and strong focus on bookings and brand perception.
restaurante.challenge: Turn visits into reservations and strengthen positioning beyond social media channels.
restaurante.focus: Editorial visual language, better menu structure, and booking CTAs in critical navigation points.

clinica.title: Vitality Clinic
clinica.description: Clinic website focused on credibility, specialties, and clear appointment flow for patients.
clinica.challenge: Build trust on first contact while making scheduling easier without overloading the team.
clinica.focus: Medical information hierarchy, trust signals, and objective contact flows.

marketplace.title: Vantage Marketplace
marketplace.description: Complete industrial marketplace with catalog, product details, cart, and access flow for procurement teams.
marketplace.challenge: Structure large SKU volumes while preserving operational clarity for high-ticket procurement.
marketplace.focus: Robust navigation architecture, technical language, and acquisition + wholesale journeys.

saas.title: NexusBiz SaaS
saas.description: Operational SaaS panel with orders, inventory, customers, sales, and reports in one unified interface.
saas.challenge: Consolidate team indicators and workflows in a clear, fast, and reliable environment.
saas.focus: Module-based navigation, priority data visibility, and smooth day-to-day operator experience.

curate.title: Curate Resume SaaS
curate.description: Resume-focused SaaS with onboarding, dashboard, builder, and preview experience in one product flow.
curate.challenge: Present a complete product journey that balances polished UI and practical workflow depth.
curate.focus: Premium positioning, guided user flow, and realistic product screens for high-value demos.
